name: Fudge Oatmeal (No Bake) Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Bring mixture to a boil and continue boiling for one minute.
3. Remove from heat and stir in 1 tablespoon Vanilla extract.
4. Pour the mixture into a bowl containing 3 cups (quick-cooking) Oatmeal and 1/2 cup Peanut butter.
5. Mix well until combined.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
